inline_comments: If true, drop messages that mention another user/role but not this one (not @everyone/@here). Default: false.
If true, drop messages that mention another user/role but not this one (not @everyone/@here). Default: false.
originating Discord channel, "both" sends to both. When target is "channel" or "both", buttons
Enable Discord thread binding features (/focus, thread-bound delivery, and thread-bound subagent session flows). Overrides session.threadBindings.enabled when set.
Inactivity window for thread-bound sessions in hours. Session auto-unfocuses after this amount of idle time. Set to 0 to disable. Default: 24.
Optional hard max age for thread-bound sessions in hours. Session auto-unfocuses once this age is reached even if active. Set to 0 to disable. Default: 0.
Allow `sessions_spawn({ thread: true })` to auto-create + bind Discord threads for subagent sessions. Default: false (opt-in).
Allow `/acp spawn` to auto-create + bind Discord threads for ACP sessions. Default: false (opt-in).
Break-glass override: allow mutable identity matching (names/tags/slugs) in allowlists. Default behavior is ID-only matching.

Controls how guild channel messages are handled: - "open": guild channels bypass allowlists; mention-gating applies - "disabled": block all guild channel messages - "allowlist": only allow channels present in discord.guilds.*.channels

Live stream preview mode: - "off": disable preview updates - "partial": edit a single preview message - "block": stream in chunked preview updates - "progress": alias that maps to "partial" on Discord Legacy boolean values are still accepted and auto-migrated.
Soft max line count per Discord message. Discord clients can clip/collapse very tall messages; splitting by lines keeps replies readable in-channel. Default: 17.
Alias for dm.policy (prefer this so it inherits cleanly via base->account shallow merge). Legacy key: channels.discord.dm.policy.
Alias for dm.allowFrom (prefer this so it inherits cleanly via base->account shallow merge). Legacy key: channels.discord.dm.allowFrom.
Per-channel ack reaction override. Discord supports both unicode emoji and custom emoji names.
In-process worker settings for queued inbound Discord runs. This is separate from Carbon's eventQueue listener budget.
Max time (ms) a queued inbound run may execute before OpenClaw aborts it. Defaults to 1800000 (30 minutes). Set 0 to disable the worker-owned timeout.

Carbon EventQueue configuration. Controls how Discord gateway events are processed. `listenerTimeout` only covers gateway listener work such as normalization and enqueue. It does not control the lifetime of queued inbound agent turns.

concerns: Multiple concerns detected: database, ui, api, business_logic, auth, logging
